01-delta-q1-recap.html.excerpt: Delta beat at $0.46 vs $0.39 consensus but guided Q2 RASM to flat. The real story is the muted premarket reaction. Here's the airline read-through.

02-cpi-eve.html.excerpt: CPI drops Thursday 8:30 AM ET. Core consensus is 2.9%. Three scenarios, three Fed outcomes, three equity reactions. Your positioning guide.

03-mortgage-apps-plunge.html.excerpt: MBA mortgage apps fell 5.6% this week. The 30-year at 6.85% broke the purchase index. Here's why homebuilders are the cleanest short.

04-steel-week-one.html.excerpt: One week into Section 232, Nucor is up 7.4%, CLF up 11.3%, US Steel up 9.5%. The quality vs sensitivity trade is already splitting the group.

05-banks-cheat-sheet.html.excerpt: JPM, GS, WFC, and C all report next Tuesday. Trading desks win, credit desks lose. Your full setup for the financials report card.

06-crude-whipsaw.html.excerpt: WTI ran from $112 to $98 to $104 in three sessions. Realized vol is 68% vs 28% baseline. The volatility itself is the trade, not the direction.
